narrative.default: OTIF fell from 94% to 76% starting Jan 14. Primary drivers: (1) port-to-DC lead time +2.3 days on Mundra→Jebel Ali due to forwarder switch, (2) Arabic care-label nonconformance across 3 towel subcategories, and (3) ASN accuracy dropped to 91.1%, causing receiving delays.
narrative.revised: OTIF fell from 94% to 76% starting Jan 14. Primary driver: ASN mapping errors (carton count mismatches, missing SSCC barcodes) causing GRN delays of 4-6 hours. Port dwell has normalized to 1.9 days after QuickFreight stabilized. Arabic label compliance (Template V2.3) remains a secondary factor affecting 26 SKUs.

hypotheses.original: Primary cause: Port dwell increase (+2.3 days) from forwarder switch
hypotheses.revised: Revised cause: ASN mapping errors (primary) → Port dwell normal; forwarder transition completed successfully

complianceHolds.details: Template V2.3 applied instead of approved V2.1

complianceHolds.issue: Arabic care label font size below minimum

complianceHolds.details: Washing symbol doesn't match Arabic text

actions.title: Temporary forwarder switch for next 2 POs
actions.description: Revert to MaerskLine Global for upcoming shipments to stabilize port-to-DC transit

actions.title: Rollback Arabic label template to V2.1
actions.description: Instruct supplier to revert to approved label template V2.1 for all towel/bedding SKUs

actions.title: Sample approval for corrected labels within 48h
actions.description: Supplier to submit 3 sample SKUs with corrected labels for QC approval

actions.title: Block ASN if carton_count mismatch >2%
actions.description: Enable system validation to reject ASN where carton count differs significantly

actions.title: Prioritize GRN for Top 30 SKUs
actions.description: Fast-track receiving for high-velocity bedding/towel SKUs

actions.title: Freeze new PO release pending recovery
actions.description: Hold subsequent orders until OTIF recovers above 85%

communication.subject: Urgent: Corrective Action Required - Arabic Label Compliance & ASN Quality
communication.preview: We have identified critical compliance issues with recent shipments requiring immediate attention. Action Required: Rollback to Label Template V2.1 immediately.

narrative.default: Al-Futtaim Textiles continues to perform excellently with OTIF at 96% (up from 95%). Local Dubai supply chain shows minimal variability. No corrective actions required at this time.

hypotheses.original: No issues detected - supplier performing above target

narrative.default: OTIF declined from 92% to 89% starting Jan 16. Primary drivers: (1) Shenzhen port congestion adding +1.2 days to transit time, (2) Fashion accessory packaging damage on 8 cartons, and (3) Minor ASN timing delays affecting dock scheduling.
narrative.revised: After further analysis, port congestion was temporary (Chinese New Year prep). Primary issue is supplier packaging quality - 12% of cartons showed damage requiring rework at DC. Recommend packaging audit.

hypotheses.original: Primary cause: Shenzhen port congestion due to CNY preparation
hypotheses.revised: Revised cause: Packaging quality issues (primary) → Port congestion was temporary and has normalized

complianceHolds.details: 8 cartons with crushed corners, rework required

actions.title: Packaging quality audit at origin
actions.description: Conduct on-site packaging inspection at GuangZhou facility before CNY

actions.title: Pre-CNY shipment acceleration
actions.description: Expedite remaining Q1 orders before Chinese New Year shutdown

actions.title: Enforce ASN pre-arrival submission
actions.description: Require ASN submission 24h before vessel arrival at Jebel Ali

communication.subject: Action Required: Packaging Quality & Pre-CNY Shipment Coordination
communication.preview: We have observed packaging quality issues on recent shipments. Please conduct internal quality check before CNY shutdown.

narrative.default: Riyadh Home Decor maintains excellent performance with OTIF at 97% (up from 96%). Local KSA supply chain is highly efficient with same-day delivery capabilities. Supplier is a benchmark for regional performance.

hypotheses.original: No issues detected - top performing local supplier
